name: Adham Dannaway
bio: Product designer specialising in UI design and design systems, with a passion for frontend development. I bridge the gap between design and code.

projects.title: Figma Design System
projects.description: A comprehensive design system built in Figma, featuring component libraries, design tokens, and documentation.

projects.title: UI Design Book
projects.description: Authored a comprehensive guide on UI design principles, covering typography, color theory, layout, and interaction patterns.

name: Brittany Chiang
bio: Frontend engineer with expertise in crafting accessible, pixel-perfect user interfaces. I work at the intersection of design and engineering.

projects.title: Klaviyo Design System
projects.description: Leading engineering efforts across Klaviyo's component library and frontend platform, ensuring accessibility.

projects.title: Spotify Profile
projects.description: Web app for visualizing personalized Spotify data with beautiful data visualization and interaction design.

name: Artur Bień
bio: I build quality UIs for fun. Frontend developer and UI enthusiast with a passion for creating beautiful, interactive interfaces.

projects.title: expensive.toys
projects.description: Personal portfolio and blog showcasing UI experiments, design explorations, and frontend engineering projects.

projects.title: UI Experiments
projects.description: Collection of interactive UI experiments exploring new design patterns and animation techniques.

name: Andy Bell
bio: Designer and frontend developer who loves CSS, design systems, and building accessible web experiences. Crafting for the web for over 20 years.

projects.title: Piccalilli
projects.description: A design system and blog built with modern CSS techniques, showcasing container queries and cascade layers.

name: Aneeth Kumaar
bio: Graphic Designer | Programmer. Blending visual design with code to create unique digital experiences.

projects.title: Creative Coding Experiments
projects.description: Collection of generative art and interactive design experiments using code as a creative medium.

name: Simon Pan
bio: UX Designer at Google. Previously designed Uber Magic 2.0 and Amazon Prime Music. Known for case studies that are the gold standard for hiring managers.

projects.title: Uber Magic 2.0
projects.description: Redesigned the Uber experience with focus on delight and seamlessness in ride-hailing.

projects.title: Amazon Prime Music
projects.description: UX design for music streaming experience at Amazon.

name: Robin Nogiuer
bio: Freelance interaction designer from France. One of the best portfolios we have seen — incredibly engaging and polished.

projects.title: Selected Works
projects.description: Collection of freelance interaction design projects showcasing engaging and polished interfaces.

name: Austin Knight
bio: Product designer at Google. Openly shares projects, thoughts and ideas with a very interesting process description.

projects.title: Design Process Documentation
projects.description: Detailed walkthrough of design thinking and approach for various Google projects.

name: Buzz Usborne
bio: Principal Designer at Help Scout. Previously led design at Atlassian, Skype and Campaign Monitor. Specializes in remote collaboration and design leadership.

projects.title: Design Leadership Portfolio
projects.description: Case studies from leading design teams at Help Scout, Atlassian, and Skype.

name: Board & Vellum
bio: Architecture, interior design, and landscape architecture firm. Specializing in private residences, multifamily buildings, commercial environments, and civic spaces.

projects.title: Lucille on Roosevelt Rooftop Garden
projects.description: Gray Awards Finalist for landscape design featuring innovative rooftop garden.

projects.title: Mixed-Use Development
projects.description: Multifamily and mixed-use building design combining residential and commercial spaces.

name: Douglas Cardinal
bio: Architect known for organic, flowing designs inspired by nature. 'Without any preconceptions, I evolve a design from the inside out, open to all possibilities.'

projects.title: Canadian Museum of History
projects.description: Iconic flowing architecture inspired by Canadian landscape and Indigenous culture.

name: Helen Koss
bio: Interior designer with a modern, stylish approach. Portfolio features immersive background video and beautifully categorized project collections.

projects.title: Residential Projects

name: Selina Turfus
bio: Product designer showcasing shipped product work with end-to-end case studies demonstrating design impact.

projects.title: Product Design Case Studies

name: Jenny Du
bio: Product designer with a clean, minimal portfolio showcasing design thinking and user-centered solutions.

projects.title: Selected Product Work
projects.description: Curated collection of product design projects demonstrating user-centered approach.

name: Elle Levine
bio: Senior Product Designer crafting intuitive digital experiences. Portfolio showcases clean case studies with clear problem-solution narratives.

projects.title: Digital Product Design
projects.description: Case studies from designing products at scale for major tech companies.

name: Zaha Hadid Architects
bio: Global architecture studio known for visionary, parametric designs. Pushing boundaries of what's possible in architecture and urban design.

projects.description: Starfish-shaped airport terminal showcasing parametric design at massive scale.

projects.title: The Gherkin (30 St Mary Axe)

name: Cameron MacNeil
bio: Interior designer known for sophisticated, layered spaces that blend contemporary and classic elements.

projects.title: Manhattan Residence

name: Patricia Urquiola
bio: Spanish architect and designer based in Milan. Known for furniture, product, and architectural design that blends craftsmanship with industrial processes.

projects.title: Furniture Collections
projects.description: Iconic furniture designs for brands like Moroso, Cassina, and BMW.

name: Karim Rashid
bio: Industrial designer known for distinctive use of colors, fluid forms, and innovative materials. 'I want to change the world one object at a time.'

projects.title: Product Design Portfolio
